title: Multiple assignees with an automation to a single column
excerpt:

posts.author: GustavoM (J. Gustavo M)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be great if it could be possible to assign multiple person using an automation to a single person column.

I see that it is possible to create and assign a whole team with an automation, but it is not possible to add guests to a team. ( I also voted for this feature to add guest to team in the community). So, as it is not possible, I would like to see if it could be possible to assign multiple members and guest to a single person column using an automation.

posts.author: NickNourishandSow (Nick Mitchell)
posts.cookedHtml:
I understand the intentional limitations of Guests, but I’d also like to see this feature added. My use case does not include Guests.

I’d like the ability to add multiple people to an item from one automation. Currently, if I create the automation below, it will assign one person, assign the next but remove the first, then assign the third but remove the second. I’d like for it to add all 3 people without removing anyone.

image1252×194 12.4 KB

I’ve also experimented with the following automation chain but yielded the same results.

image1236×373 34.3 KB

I understand the use of Teams, however items assigned to a Team do not currently work with Dynamic Filtering of the person column:

With a large team, Dynamic Filtering is a MUST for us. Otherwise, we would have to create SO many different Table views for each user and manually assign the custom filtering conditions to each one and send out a mass message to everyone to mark their view as their default view.

So my feedback is this:
Either adjust the ability of the automation to allow us for adding multiple people with a chain of “Assign Person as Assignee” prompts,
or
If we use the dynamic view and select a person, it also displays assigned items that are assigned to a Team they are a part of.

posts.author: GustavoM (J. Gustavo M)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello monday.com team,

I was able to see in the latest product update, that this request has been taken into consideration. We will be testing the improvements, and I would like to extent the appreciation from our team.

Thanks a lot!

Screen Shot 2022-03-22 at 13.08.59685×613 65.6 KB

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
